output.sparql:
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?predecessor ?predecessorLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q108953047 p:P39 ?currentStatement ; pq:P580 ?currentStart .
  ?predecessor p:P39 ?prevStatement ; wdt:P39 wd:Q137830812 ; rdfs:label ?predecessorLabel .
  ?prevStatement pq:P580 ?prevStart .
  FILTER(LANG(?predecessorLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(?prevStart < ?currentStart)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?prevStart)
LIMIT 1

Wes Hall

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?predecessor ?predecessorLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q108953047 p:P39 ?currentStatement ; pq:P580 ?currentStart .
  ?predecessor p:P39 ?prevStatement ; wdt:P39 wd:Q137830812 ; rdfs:label ?predecessorLabel .
  ?prevStatement pq:P580 ?prevStart .
  FILTER(LANG(?predecessorLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(?prevStart < ?currentStart)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?prevStart)
LIMIT 1
```
